migration_blocker: Repository must be transferred from the personal owner yinyufan0813-cmyk to an approved GitHub organization before customer-distribution Real GA. GitHub teams are only enforceable for organization-owned repositories.
live_evidence_policy: Real GA requires a live GitHub API report proving owner_type=Organization, all required teams exist, CODEOWNERS references resolved teams, branch protection requires CODEOWNERS review, and no personal-owner fallback is active.
